content_body:
F R E S H  and  F U N

Blue Ridge's Fast Casual Taco shop serves up unique street-style Tacos and Bowls made with natural, fresh ingredients. All meat is hormone/steroid free, grass-fed, free-range; seafood is wild-caught

Full Bar // Pair your tacos with Margaritas, Craft Beer, or Cocktails. 

Menu updates often 

Blue Ridge's best tacos and bowls you'll ever eat ~ are located next to Pedego Bicycle on E. Main Street, just beyond the parking area at TruFitness Gym.

Monday Closed
Tuesday Closed
Wednesday 12:00 pm - 7:00 pm
Thursday 12:00 pm - 7:00 pm
Friday 12:00 pm - 7:00 pm
Saturday 12:00 pm - 7:00 pm
Sunday Closed
title: Oscar Chili's Tacoria
